branch_contract.first_test_policy: software diagnostic proxy before touching canonical organism classes
branch_contract.implementation_hint: structured LIF subcircuits with delays/time constants; no custom neuron model required for first PyNN/SpiNNaker-safe version
nonclaims: not proof of custom resonate-and-fire neurons
branch_contract.promotion_rule: promote only to integration gate if benefit or mechanistic sham-separated value appears with no material regression

claim_boundary: Tier 5.20a is a software-only diagnostic for an optional polyp internal model. It keeps the current 16-excitatory-neuron budget as 16 resonant LIF-style branches and compares against v2.3, v2.2, lag/reservoir/ESN controls, and branch shams. It is not a canonical organism change, not hardware evidence, and not a baseline freeze.

classification.recommendation: Do not integrate into the core organism; either park it or redesign the branch objective/tasks.
